name: SGLang on NVIDIA
description: AccelMark runner for NVIDIA GPUs using SGLang. Supports all suites (A–E). Enables direct throughput and latency comparison between SGLang and vLLM on the same hardware.
notes: Uses sglang.Engine for offline/accuracy and sglang.AsyncEngine for online/interactive/sustained. Output tokens counted via tokenizer encode due to SGLang returning decoded text rather than token IDs.
